title: Obstetrics and Gynecology
description: The Gynecology and Obstetrics course is one of the compulsory major courses for medical students, on part with Internal Medicine, Surgery and Pediatrics which is specialized in research on female reproductive system physiology, pathological changes and fertility regulation.

instructors.name: 朱雪琼;王繁;沈奇;夏露;倪竞翔
